summary: Tested post dropdown menu (Edit, Highlight, Delete, Share), edit dialog, highlight badge, and live stream permission features. Fixed haptic.warning bug. All core functionality working correctly.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails on initial connect with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established' - reconnection works (known issue from previous iteration)

passed_tests: POST /api/posts/{id} (PUT) - Edit post endpoint works (14/14 backend tests pass)
Post dropdown menu shows: Edit Post, Highlight Post, Delete Post, Share options
Edit Post opens dialog with textarea pre-filled with current content
Editing post updates content and shows '(edited)' label next to username
Highlight Post toggles gold star badge 'Highlighted Post' above post
Highlighted posts have subtle gold gradient background
Delete Post shows browser confirmation dialog before deletion
Delete removes post from feed and shows 'Post deleted' toast
Only post owner sees Edit/Highlight/Delete options (verified: other user's posts only show Share)
Live Stream page shows 'Go Live' banner and dialog
Start Live Stream dialog explains 'Your camera and microphone will be used for streaming'
LiveStream.jsx contains permission dialog with Camera icon, title 'Camera & Microphone Access', explanation text, and 'Allow Access' button
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing haptic.warning() method in /app/frontend/src/utils/mobile.js - was causing runtime error on Delete Post click
Post management backend endpoints properly check user ownership before allowing edit/highlight/delete
DropdownMenu uses proper data-testid attributes: edit-post-{id}, highlight-post-{id}, delete-post-{id}
Edit dialog uses DialogContent from shadcn/ui with proper dark theme styling
Highlight badge uses gold star icon (#FFD700) and subtle gold gradient background
Live stream permission dialog in LiveStream.jsx is well-structured with Camera icon, explanation of camera/mic usage, Cancel and Allow Access buttons
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_post_management.py - Created test file for post edit/highlight/delete
seed_data_creation: Posts created during testing cleaned up via DELETE endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post management features (edit/highlight/delete) fully tested. Dropdown menu shows correct options based on ownership. Edit shows (edited) label. Highlight shows gold star badge. Delete shows confirmation and removes post. Live stream permission dialog exists in LiveStream.jsx but requires creating a stream to trigger. WebSocket has known intermittent connection issues.
